title: Hello World
List Comprehension
code:
numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
squares = [n**2 for n in numbers if n % 2 == 0]
print(squares)

title: Simple Decorator
Async Fetch
User Interface
Enum Pattern Matching
Template Function
Goroutine Channel
Basic Join
code:
SELECT u.name, o.order_date
FROM users u
JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
WHERE o.status = 'shipped'
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC;

title: File Existence Check
code:
if [ -f "$FILE" ]; then
    echo "$FILE exists."
else
    echo "$FILE does not exist."
fi
